message:
feat(engine): add C2 and C3 milestone gate specs with fail-closed metadata contracts

Expand the cut-line automation system with complete C2 and C3 milestone
gate specifications, complementing the existing C1 gate for multi-phase
release qualification.

CutLineSpec::default_c2() mandatory categories:
- Handoff readiness, runtime parity, deterministic replay, security
  survival, flake burden with strict pass thresholds

CutLineSpec::default_c3() mandatory categories:
- WASM parity, router calibration, evidence ledger, observability
  integrity with production-readiness thresholds

C1 expanded to include DeterministicReplay and ObservabilityIntegrity
as mandatory categories that were previously optional.

Metadata contract enforcement:
- ~22 new metadata contract keys across C1/C2/C3 prefixes
- Fail-closed evidence validation: missing any required metadata key
  triggers automatic gate denial
- Predecessor gate requirements: C2 requires C1 pass, C3 requires C2

Integration tests cover:
- C1/C2/C3 input builders with full metadata fixture generation
- Denial paths for missing metadata keys and predecessor failures
- Category failure propagation through the gate pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
